title: koellia incana
intro: Koellia incana, also known as the incana or Kiekie, is a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Koellia incana include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and relieving respiratory issues. Koellia incana can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional remedies such as poultices and salves.
